name: Shredded Wheat Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons grated orange peel (orange part only)
1 teaspoon grated lemon peel (yellow part only)
2 cups old-fashioned or quick-cooking oatmeal, uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour with baking soda, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. Beat shortening until light and fluffy. Add sugars gradually, creaming well.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time.
4. Add vanilla, honey, grated orange peel, and lemon peel.
5. Gradually add the cereals, fruits, and nuts; mix well.
6. Mix in the flour mixture until well blended.
7. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 to 15 minutes, or until done.
Makes about 8 dozen small cookies
